concept.core_loop: drag anywhere to steer your ship with a virtual joystick; it auto-fires at the nearest enemy; dodge and destroy waves of enemies closing in from the edges; score per kill; difficulty: enemies spawn faster and tougher each wave (~every 15s) up to a cap
mechanics: virtual joystick: drag to move the ship (relative to drag origin)
auto-aim and auto-fire at the nearest enemy on a cooldown
bullets travel with a lifetime and despawn off-screen
player-enemy collision costs a life and grants brief invulnerability
no-hit streak multiplier (reward beat): consecutive kills without taking a hit raise a score multiplier
wave/difficulty ramp every ~15s up to a cap
concept.art_direction: neon vector on near-black (#06080f); cyan triangular player ship with additive glow and a short thruster trail; enemies as magenta and red angular shapes (triangles/chevrons) with glow; yellow glowing capsule bullets with muzzle flash; each kill pops a particle burst + brief white flash; player hit triggers screen shake + red edge flash + ship blink during invuln; faint parallax starfield plus a subtle grid that scrolls opposite the ship motion so there is no dead space; HUD top: lives, score, wave, and streak multiplier that pulses as it climbs
concept.differentiation_notes: one-thumb control (drag-to-move + auto-fire) instead of fiddly twin-stick, with a no-hit streak multiplier that rewards aggressive dodging over turtling
